about.label: About us
about.title: The taste of the sea in the heart of Trenčín
about.text: Adriano Restaurant & Cafe brings authentic Mediterranean cuisine with fresh seafood, homemade pasta and wines directly from Istria and Croatia. Since 2015 we have been a place where friends, families and lovers of good food come together.
about.heroSubtitle: Since 2015 in the Heart of Trenčín
about.storyP1: Adriano Restaurant & Cafe was born in 2015 from a love for the Adriatic Sea and Mediterranean cuisine. Founder Adriano brought authentic recipes from the sunny shores of Istria and Croatia to the heart of Trenčín.
about.storyP2: Every morning we select the freshest seafood to offer you dishes full of Mediterranean flavours. Our specialities are prepared according to traditional recipes passed down from generation to generation.
about.storyP3: The restaurant has become a favourite meeting place for families, friends and lovers of good food from across Trenčín and beyond. We created a space where you feel like you're on a seaside holiday — right in the heart of Slovakia.
about.storyP4: Our mission is to bring you an experience, not just a meal. Every detail — from ingredient selection to atmosphere — is thoughtfully crafted to make your evening unforgettable.
about.cuisine1Text: Fresh prawns, octopus, lobster and mussels straight from the Adriatic Sea. Every day we select the best for your table.
about.cuisine2Text: Hand-made pasta and pizza from authentic Neapolitan dough. Recipes passed down from generation to generation.
about.cuisine3Text: A carefully curated collection of wines from Istria, Croatia and Italy. We recommend the perfect pairing for every dish.
about.teamText: Behind every exceptional dish stands a team of passionate people who love their work and you, our guests.

items.text: Fantastic grilled octopus! Best restaurant in Trenčín.
items.author: Mária K.

items.text: Bavette Fruti di Mare was perfect. I will definitely come back!
items.author: Peter S.

items.text: Great service, excellent wine from Istria. Atmosphere like in Croatia.
items.author: Jana M.

items.text: The lobster was fresh and perfectly prepared. I recommend it to everyone!
items.author: Tomáš B.
